# Caption & evidence alignment audit (safe artifacts, current snippets)

**Checked:** `reports/manuscript_artifacts/latex_snippets/{figure1,figure4,table1,table2,table4,table5,figure5}_snippet.tex` (as generated by `scripts/paper/build_kbs_main_manuscript_artifacts.py`).

**Global evidence state:** `analysis/evict_value_wulver_v1_policy_comparison_heavy_r1.csv` **absent** → Table 3 / Fig. 2–3 not evidence-backed; offline bundle (T4/F4; T5/F5 supplements) is the quantitative core for training.

---

## Figure 1 — `figure1_snippet.tex`

| Aspect | Assessment |
|--------|--------------|
| **Conservative?** | **Mostly yes** — “Conceptual overview,” offline vs. online panels. |
| **Overclaim risk** | “**optional guarded fallback**” implies guard is part of the **story**; canonical KBS bundle has **no** heavy_r1 artifact for `evict_value_v1_guarded`. A reader may think guard is evaluated. |
| **Suggested change** | Replace or qualify: e.g. “optional **guard wrapper** (implementation exists; **not** part of the canonical heavy\_r1 quantitative bundle in this repository).” Or: “optional fallback path when using `evict_value_v1_guarded`” — only if paper discusses it. |

---

## Table 1 — `table1_snippet.tex`

| Aspect | Assessment |
|--------|--------------|
| **Conservative?** | **Yes** — states offline dataset construction; **Caveat** on **Main** until policy CSV; capacities from dataset spec. |
| **Overclaim risk** | Low. “next-arrival style metadata” is accurate for trace format (see `evict_value_wulver_v1` trace parsing). |
| **Suggested change** | Optional: shorten “Hint:” line to “Hint: metadata fields (`bucket`, `confidence`) at request time” if you want less informal wording. No mandatory fix. |

---

## Table 2 — `table2_snippet.tex`

| Aspect | Assessment |
|--------|--------------|
| **Conservative?** | **Borderline** — caption: “**Main policies used in the empirical comparison.**” If eval has **not** run, “empirical comparison” suggests **numbers exist**. |
| **Overclaim risk** | Medium when policy CSV missing. |
| **Suggested change** | “**Policies in the planned main comparison** (replay results require `evict_value_wulver_v1_policy_comparison_heavy_r1.csv`).” Or: “Policies evaluated in the heavy\_r1 **design** (Table~3 when available).” |

---

## Table 4 — `table4_snippet.tex`

| Aspect | Assessment |
|--------|--------------|
| **Conservative?** | **Yes** — offline ablation, lower is better, bold/underline rules, cites `best_config_heavy_r1.json` with horizon/model. |
| **Overclaim risk** | Low. Ties Fig. 4 via cross-ref. |
| **Suggested change** | Optional: add “**Offline training/validation metrics**; not end-to-end replay misses” in caption if not already implied by section title (snippet already points to same evidence as Fig. 4). Acceptable as-is. |

---

## Figure 4 — `figure4_snippet.tex`

| Aspect | Assessment |
|--------|--------------|
| **Conservative?** | **Yes** — references canonical `model_comparison_heavy_r1.csv`, validation/test, lower is better. |
| **Overclaim risk** | Low. |
| **Suggested change** | None required. |

| **Overclaim risk** | Low. |
| **Suggested change** | None required for evidence scope. **Remove or demote** this table from main paper once Table 3 exists (per `kbs_safe_paper_package.md`). |

| Aspect | Assessment |
|--------|--------------|
| **Conservative?** | **Yes** — “Offline training only,” Top-1, same CSV as Table 4, explicit “Does **not** depict policy-level replay misses.” |
| **Overclaim risk** | Low. |
| **Suggested change** | None required. Same lifecycle as Table 5. |

## Summary

| Artifact | Fully conservative? | Action before rewrite |
|----------|---------------------|------------------------|
| Fig. 1 | Minor | Soften or scope **guard/fallback** mention |
| Table 1 | Yes | Optional wording polish |
| Table 2 | **No** (if no eval) | **Rename** caption to “planned” / conditional on CSV |
| Table 4 | Yes | Optional one-line “offline only” |
| Fig. 4 | Yes | — |
| Table 5 | Yes | Keep as supplement; drop after eval |
| Fig. 5 | Yes | Keep as supplement; drop after eval |

**Implement changes** by editing `build_kbs_main_manuscript_artifacts.py` (snippet writers for `_figure1_method_overview`, `_build_table2_policy_roster`) and re-running `python scripts/paper/build_kbs_main_manuscript_artifacts.py`.
